changelog:
## 🧪 Notes beta (à compléter avant push)

- Ajout : diagnostic pré-lancement amélioré
- Amélioration : update launcher plus fiable
- Fix : correction retour de version après auto-update

## ⚠️ À tester

- 


---

## Commits inclus
- ci: stamp embedded launcher version before build and keep main info on promote merge (d064e2a) - chore(beta): update info.json -> v0.3.3 (5254725) - Merge branch 'beta' of https://github.com/Zokkyen/Launcher-Zokkymon into beta (d98dc10) - Update readme with new Workflow (fbdbdd3) - chore(beta): update info.json -> v0.3.2 (42f4212) - ci: remove unavailable Launch4j version pin from Chocolatey install (10a54ef) - ci: make release workflows update info.json directly and pin Launch4j 3.50 (f75fee0) - ci: remove unsupported Launch4j requires64Bit field (6bf85b5) - ci: remove unsupported Launch4j requiresJdk field (dc08801) - ci: run Launch4j via java CLI to avoid launch4jc runtime issue (5a04429) - ci: run Launch4j with Java 8 in Actions (dcf60cc) - ci: fix Launch4j executable resolution in GitHub Actions (7568828) - chore(beta): update pending release notes (52985a0) - ci(release): add beta auto-release and stable promotion workflows (31ec092) - release: update to version 0.3.0 with new URL and SHA256 (c1e2013) - chore(beta): sync release script and splash-mod from main (c4aca9c) - chore(release): add cmd wrapper to run release-main.ps1 with ExecutionPolicy Bypass (6313dee) - fix(updater): stabilize self-update target and persist local launcher version (e33a0f9) - chore(beta): ignore local runtime and gradle build artifacts (1351450) - release: prepare 0.3.0 metadata and launcher updates (2ac55d5)
